articles.author: Stephen Fowler
articles.title: Poll: Most Americans have the summer blues about Trump and the economy - NPR
articles.description: A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll finds a record low share of Americans approve of President Trump's job performance and his handling of the economy heading into the summer before a key midterm election.
articles.content: As concern over gas prices remains high, President Trump's approval ratings continue falling to record lows, especially over his handling of the economy, according to the latest NPR/PBS News/Marist p… [+4470 chars]

articles.author: Jules-Pierre Malartre
articles.title: Look up! The moon and Venus will stage a rare daytime disappearing act today - Space
articles.description: The moon will briefly hide Venus during a rare daytime occultation on June 17, visible from parts of North America.
